allow:
Bash(/tmp/cleanup.sed << 'EOF'
# Remove console.log lines with these patterns that appear in loops
/console.log.*Fetching.*window:/d
/console.log.*Empty window/d
/console.log.*Waiting.*ms before next/d
/console.log.*Received.*from API/d
/console.log.*Normalized.*trades.*\\|.*Normalized.*orders.*\\|.*Normalized.*deposits.*\\|.*Normalized.*withdrawals/d
/console.log.*Inserted.*new.*duplicates/d
/console.log.*No valid.*after normalization/d
/console.log.*No new.*found/d
/console.log.*Got.*total.*in window/d
/console.log.*Reached.*history/d
/console.log.*Reached.*beginning.*of timeline/d
/console.log.*Reached current time/d
/console.log.*Reached end of/d
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/cleanup2.sed << 'EOF'
# Remove per-symbol/per-item logs in loops
/console.log.*Fetching.*trades retrieved so far/d
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/cleanup3.sed << 'EOF'
# Remove more per-window logs
/console.log.*Fetched.*from.*toISOString/d
EOF)
